youtube.text:
Highlights ❌
Vozinha saves ✅
When you're 40 and have nothing left to lose, you just grab whatever you can.
Vozinha was actually possessed by the soul of lev yashin during the game
So happy for these small countries having some shining in this World Cup. Brilliant idea to have more countries in. Finally football is inclusive
Dude the goalkeeper was insane in this match 💀
Vozinha activated his sharingan
Seriously, Cape Verde might be the most underrated team in this tournament. What an indomitable defense they have.
I had never heard of him before, but after this match became a huge fan of Vozinha. It's very insane that he can stop so many shots at 40 years old. A LIVING LEGEND.
Considering Spain was projected to win the world cup, this is REALLY surprising.
Cape Verde securing a point against Spain in their wc debut is the most improbable result in the WC history.
No other goalie in the world could have played a better game than what Vozinha played. Not easy on the world's biggest stage. Bravo.
One of best debut match in the history of world cup while keeping draw with Spain. The goalkeeper and players who gave their best for their nation.
Legendary performance by 40-year-old keeper Vozinha. Hats off to him.
Dear Vozinha because of you, we came to know your country. your tears fell into hearts of millions of us , carrying the warmth of courage, passion, and devotion.
Vozinha was outstanding, Cape Verde commited only 1 foul which insane. Great effort by the whole team. Respect for coach Bubista 💪

Wow wow! A legendary 7-save clean sheet that secured a [shocking!] 0-0 World Cup draw against Spain!!! 😮 Vozinha, he is the ultimate ageless wonder of football, proving that life doesn't just begin at 40!!!🎉🎉❤
What a debut match in the World Cup! 🤯🤩 I hope Cabo Verde make it at least out of the group stage, they have a really exciting squad and the country and fans really deserves it
Vozinha having Buffon in left hand and Casillas in right hand.

It's so beautiful to see so many Cape Verdeans at Atlanta.
I love how they love their country and saw Cabo Verde at a WC. They really support them passionately.

While ENTIRE Barca fanbase support Argentina, Spain because their home country India can't make a WC
I was at the game. I feel like I am still dreaming. A masterclass of defending. You have to give credit to the coaching staff for drawing a great game plan. What a performance.
I am not a big Football fan, but Moments like this bring tears to my eyes 😊👍
Goalkeeper VOZINHA and Cape Verde's defenders were impeccable.
Capo Verde's goalkeeper was very interesting player and saves 7 goal sheed. 1:46
Giving hope and confidence to other teams. Thank you, Cabo Verde! 🇨🇻
Increíble el portero de Cabo Verde no jugo con las manos jugo con el corazón de su pueblo.
If Vosinha 15 years younger, he would simply be playing in the Premier League next season.
We wish you all the best for the world cup 🐐🏆
a rare sight, amazing to see a goalkeeper be the clear MVP of the match
This 40 years old goal keeper who can stop so many shots and that I had never heard of him before. After this showdown I became an ardent fan of Vozinha. A LIVING LEGEND.
Vozinha, you deserve my respect! 🫡
That goal keeper deserves more recognition he was outstanding
No matter what happens in the future. this was a moment of triumph: some great saves.

Vozinha suddenly entered his prime at the age of 40!
I love this sport man you never know what can happen.
I remember when Casillas did the same for Spain in 2010
My man Vozinha made that night a nightmare for Spain🗿

正直スペインが2、3点決めたら寝ようと思ってたけど、カーボベルデの気迫が凄すぎて眠気飛んで魅入ってしまった
この試合はスペイン目的で見始めたけど、残り2試合はカーボベルデの応援のために観ます👍
What a goalkeeper fabulous flawless performance
Alternative title :- class of vozinha
gk became an overnight sensation ❤
Estaré apoyando a Cabo Verde! 🙌🏻🫶🏻.
I think Vozinha went super Saiyan this match just to get stopped by the Arteta park the bus tactics🚌🛑
Vozinha Played Really Well For Cape Verde. 👏👏👏👏👏
What a goalkeeper,  excellent ❤
Capo Verde keeper🔥 take a bow
the highlights of the match is basically him just saving all kinds of impossible goals. CRAZY DUDE, doing stuff like that at 40 is crazy, that too against spain
At this age my uncle is unable to carrying his bag and bro carrying a whole national

Outstanding performance by coba goll keper and all players
Congratulations coba....

Como fan de México, este portero es absolutamente increíble, tiene mucho potencial y un futuro brillante por delante. El hecho de que esta pequeña nación haya logrado empatar con España y haya atajado 7 tiros de los españoles es realmente impresionante, y espero de verdad que Cabo Verde llegue lejos en el Mundial. Pero, al fin y al cabo, ¡Viva México! 🇲🇽🇲🇽
Incredible Vozinha!!!

very impressed. This was the same case with Croatias goal keeper from 2018, just inhuman blockages from the goal keeper.
Vozinha carried his whole team alone! and that too against spain. This alone is an achievement and they are the highlight from this WC. They dont need the trophy to be the winner, they've already made their mark from this WC and is part of the highlights.

He's also an inspiration to have kept a resilience to facing sucess at 40. Here I am having had a breakdown last week feeling behind in life and a failure while Im almost a decade younger than him. Wishing more success to him n his team
From Vozinha having 50k before the WC to 13.5m after is sooo crazzzyyyyy
Primeiro jogo durante meus 38 anos que vejo um goleiro ser o melhor em campo

Unbelievable goal kipper ❤❤❤

Amazing victory for Cape Verde and a crushing defeat for Spain. That is the only conclusion to be drawn from this. Cape Verde's goalie is man of the tournament so far.
Capo Verde keeper❤❤❤
Full respect Vozinha❤

Thank you Vozinha
We are proud🇨🇻
